title: Youtube poop: Resident Evil 4 Deepercutt Edition
description: I been playing RE4 Wii Edition since Christmas, and I wanted to see if there were any RE4 poops on Youtube (Yes there are lots of them) and I saw a few and thought to myself... "I think I should poop this!" so I looked all over youtube to find all the cutscenes, gameplay videos, and death scenes  to make this poop.
